transcript.text: A little bit about you, we can dive in and get some context kind of on the partnership, but really, I lead customer operations for GrowthX, which means I've been here for about a month, and I'll be evaluating kind of all of our processes, our deliverables, how we're measuring KPIs and kind of achieving milestones that clients are setting with us, whether we're setting those at the right stage, things like that, so that we can start to plan and roadmap our partnerships a little bit more effectively.
So that's kind of what I'm looking to learn, but overall, like, please give us any and all feedback on what you're seeing and how you're feeling with this partnership.
I think we'll try and go a little bit end-to-end from onboarding to where you're going today.
And yeah, like, no need to filter if there's something
And if they don't like or want us to change, let us know.
Sure.
Before we kick off, Andi, I just want to ask, is Marcel going to join us?
Because I'm under the impression that Marcel is joining this call as well.
Yeah, he is running late from another call.
I was on that other call with him and he was like, we're running out of time.
So I know he's like trying to wrap that up.
But I'm just going to kick it off and we have some note takers in here.
But I think he is planning to join.
Okay, got it.
I have prepared some notes already, like feedback.
first off, I think I really enjoy working with the team.
You know, they're very responsive, open to feedback.
Always have good attitudes.
So this is one of the things that I appreciate working with the team.
But I do see there are a couple of opportunities that we can take, take things to the next level and event and
And only we want to address the performance that we've been seeing, you know, the improvement that we would like to see more.
So first off is the SEO strategy that I've noticed like actions like refresh or internal linking, external linking.
There's not much context around it.
And there are times where articles being delivered and then just asked to be reviewed.
And I would appreciate, you know, those actions can be always tied back to a strategic goal and more share proactively the why and the context.
In terms of the execution, I've noticed like small things like we publish like 10 articles per week.
There are a lot of execution implementation being done, especially like at the publishing stage where little things like publishing day.
Bye.
Duplicate external links, images not being updated.
So I would say that I expect the Q&A can tighten a bit and expect 95% accuracy.
Right now it's still a lot of like reviewing and updating.
And then in terms of the performance review, we do have a weekly meeting.
And mostly of the performance review are top level and it's quite pretty high.
And I would appreciate deep dive into the search query to spot trends, like analyze what content is, what is working and what's not working, what's, why it's not working.
We don't have to do it every week, but I appreciate do it by analyze, deeper dive into the content that we have been producing.
And do a quarterly or monthly deep dive.
And it's more data involved.
Right now, it's just very high level, I would say.

And I really request the team to do it in their last two meetings, and I know that they have worked on it, but people have a more systematic approach where, okay, every week we look at this dashboard, and then bi-weekly we can look to see what kind of performance pattern we can see, and every month we can deep dive a little bit more, like, more looking at the account holistically, and is there any directions that we need to change, or, like, any technical perspective that we need to implement.
In terms of the team structure, I know that, you know, running a startup, it's hard to avoid high turnover, but we've seen a lot of folks rotating in and out through our account.
Like, I've been counting, I think, seven people in six months' time.
And, and notice, like, that

Hi, Turnover will probably delay the product transfer because I won't say that we are, our product is very complicated, but then it's, there's a lot of like little details that the product knowledge that the account team need to manage to, and they need to learn.
So every time when a person like pick up an account, have to start reading all the documents and also like asking questions that I've shared before, and I noticed that.
So having like a document, which I share quite constantly, every time when we have a product launch, I do share those documents, and when we do the onboarding, they can reference those documents.

So I think that one thing that also delay the death of the team members, understand your co-product, and that might reduce the quality of the content, like ultimately, like have a lot more like reviews, and I do set, see.
The quality has dropped every time, like when a new member introduced.

So there's a couple times that she's been out safe or like she's been very responsive, but just no one picked her work up.
And I think like being working, you know, as a team, I think there's always a good backup system that they can, when someone's out and someone can come in and just pick it up.

content.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive feedback session on GrowthX's partnership with Yourco to improve processes and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Yourco appreciates GrowthX's responsiveness but sees opportunities for improvement in SEO strategy, execution quality, performance analysis, and team continuity](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [GrowthX is implementing changes: new platform for better knowledge transfer, restructured team with more strategic support, and plans for more in-depth performance reviews](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Both parties agree on need for more expertise sharing, tighter partnership, and focus on driving conversions beyond just content generation](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

## Topics

### Current Partnership Strengths and Challenges

  - [Strengths: GrowthX team is responsive, open to feedback, and has good attitudes](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [SEO strategy lacks context and clear ties to strategic goals](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [Execution issues: \~10 articles/week with frequent errors (publishing dates, duplicate links, images)](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Performance reviews are high-level; deeper analysis needed](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [High team turnover: 7 people in 6 months, impacting knowledge transfer and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [Lack of backup system when key personnel are unavailable](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### Performance and Goal Alignment

  - [Impressions up 50% since January, but website traffic steady](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Yourco's goal: 10-15 leads/month (30-40% increase from previous agency's 8/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Current performance below expectations, with drop since May](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [GrowthX suggests pivot from high-performing keywords to niche topics and funnel optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### GrowthX's New Platform and Approach

  - [Internal platform visualizes workflows and content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
      - [Company context management](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [Writing guidelines with AI-integrated prompts](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Workflow automation for article generation and refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [SEO analysis and research generation tools](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Platform aims to improve continuity, knowledge transfer, and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)

### Team Structure and Expertise Sharing

  - [GrowthX restructuring to provide more redundancy and strategic support](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Introducing Daryl (ex-TechCrunch) as new managing director for Yourco's account](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Plans for more expertise sharing and hands-on guidance in weekly calls](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Next Steps and Improvements

  - [Review and update content artifacts and writing guidelines with Daryl](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Implement more strategic conversations beyond weekly calls](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Focus on specific conversion goals and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Increase accountability and direct communication with support team](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with Daryl to review account strategy and updated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement more continuity in management team and strategic support](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Set up cadence for deeper performance reviews (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly)](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Yourco to review and update content artifacts in new GrowthX platform](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up regarding Marcel's absence and ensure proper communication](https://fathom.video/share/Br-zbWtKbgUxQxpMWPRYgJzWq2kJPYXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

action_items.description: Message Marcel re missed meeting; ensure he connects w/ Jessica & Brodie
Review Yourco artifacts in new GrowthX platform w/ Daryl next week; update/refine as needed
Prep for strategic planning meeting w/ Daryl & Carrie next week; outline specific goals & conversion targets
Share meeting recording & feedback w/ Daryl & team for next steps
